_comment: Tier-2 for skfem linear_elasticity#0+#1: ElementVector(ElementQuad1()).Nbfun is 2× ElementQuad1().Nbfun (Nbfun=8 vs 4 in 2D); skfem.models.elasticity.lame_parameters(E, nu) returns lambda and mu matching the analytic formulas (lam=E*nu/((1+nu)*(1-2nu)), mu=E/(2*(1+nu))). Both verified empirically 2026-06-01.
